evals.prompt: Can you generate AI context documentation for this repository so future agents can understand it faster?
evals.expected_output: Dispatches a datetime subagent first, then an architect subagent, generates root AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md, creates 3-8 module-level CLAUDE.md files with Mermaid diagrams and breadcrumbs, and prints an honest coverage summary.

evals.prompt: We added three new modules since the last context docs were written. Can you update them without losing the existing good documentation?
evals.expected_output: Runs the inventory script, identifies the three new modules, merges incremental updates into existing docs rather than blind rewrites, and reports what was added versus what was preserved.

evals.prompt: This mono-repo has 50 packages. Can you document all of them?
evals.expected_output: Selects 3-8 high-value modules only, explains the selection rationale, names skipped areas explicitly in the summary, and avoids documenting every directory.
